chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-3222 of 2019 Syed M. Bilal & others Versus CEO United Registration Industries & others Date Order with signature of Judge For order as to maintainability. Dated: 06.05.2025 None present. -.-.- This is an old case of 2019, which is over six years. It was last taken up on 27.05.2019 which is about six years ago when learned counsel for the petitioner was put on notice to satisfy this Court about maintainability of this petition. In the last six years learned counsel for the petitioner has not pursued this petition diligently and the question of maintainability is still outstanding. Today, learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation and it appears that he has lost interest in pursuing this matter, which is over sox years old. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending applications. Head of Const. Benches Judge
